expectations.evidence: with_skill outputs contain ReviewCard.tsx and page.tsx files
Avatar rendered via img or div with initials, conditional on avatarUrl prop
StarRating component renders 5 stars with amber/zinc coloring based on rating
reviewText prop rendered in p element with text-sm styling
export default function ReviewCard in ReviewCard.tsx
ReviewCardProps interface defined with avatarUrl, avatarInitials, authorName, rating, reviewText, createdAt, testId
Tailwind classes used throughout: rounded-xl, border, p-5, flex, items-center, etc.
Component file is ReviewCard.tsx, not ReviewCard/index.tsx pattern
